SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF ARMANDO DE LOERA MEJIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS LOMBARD ALLIANCE GROUP, LLC (JACOB BROWN) AND MAVEN COMMERCIAL, INC. DBA JJD PROPERTY MANAGEMENT (SANTINO DEROSE) ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LOERA MEJIA, ARMANDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOMBARD ALLIANCE GROUP, LLC MAVEN COMMERCIAL, INC. DBA JJD PROPERTY MANAGEMENT PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE SUFFERED HARM BUT HAS NOT MET THE NECESSARY BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
